gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/435)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/435)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الرَّيْحَانُ وَاحِدٌ وَ عِشْرُونَ نَوْعاً سَيِّدُهَا الْآسُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, raising it, said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The basil is of twenty one types, the chief of it is the myrtle’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from in a marfu‘ manner the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Sweet basil is of twenty-one kinds and the master among them is myrtle.’”
